Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Gabrielle Diamse, Esq. (949.661.1007; gabriellediamse@nealefhima.com) of Neale & Fhima APC for Plaintiff.
Ali Ameripour, Esq. (424.297.3103; ali@thetafirm.com) of Theta Law Firm, LLP for Defendant.

ARGUED The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HYUNDAI MOTOR AMERICA's Motion To Compel Binding Arbitration:

Defendant HYUNDAI MOTOR AMERICA's ("HMA") motion to compel arbitration and stay is granted.

see word minutes for details.

Order is signed

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
